meta.prompt:
You are evaluating two user interface screenshots for visual design quality.

Image A is shown first, Image B is shown second.

Which interface has better visual design overall? Consider layout, visual
hierarchy, clarity, and aesthetic quality.

Reply with ONLY the letter A or B. Nothing else.

pairs.caption_good: ui screenshot. well-designed. page displaying resetting password
pairs.caption_bad: ui screenshot. poor design. bad contrast. page displaying resetting password

pairs.caption_good: ui screenshot. well-designed. page displaying the information of the app
pairs.caption_bad: ui screenshot. poor design. bad proximity. page displaying the information of the app

pairs.caption_good: ui screenshot. well-designed. property details display page
pairs.caption_bad: ui screenshot. poor design. bad proximity. property details display page
